productDisplayName: Puma Men's Graphic Black Red T-shirt
description: CompositionBlack round neck short sleeved t-shirt made of 100% cotton in a distressed look, has a softly ribbed neckline with fabric tape detailing on the inseam, brand tab appliquéd on the right sleeve and graphic print on the front with lettering, including brand name and logoFittingRegularWash care Gentle machine wash in cool water Do not bleach Tumble dry at low temperature Warm iron Do not dry clean puma comes with a bang and ups your style quotient by many a degree.  This t-shirt comes with a stamp of the original puma that was established in 1948.
